name: Comtec Systems Co.,Ltd.
summary: Comtec Systems Co.,Ltd. provides various information technology (IT) consulting services in Korea and internationally. The company offers business and SI consulting, network and security consulting, IT outsourcing, solutions and industry consulting, and information security services. It also provides network integration, deployment SI, IT infrastructure, financial, IT, collaboration, security, digital imaging, green IT, unified communications, virtualization, and mobile solutions. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
